2024-08-27T11:39:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , all lanes of Fanling Highway (Sheung Shui bound) near Dawning Views are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: San Tin Highway and Fanling Highway, Both bounds, near San Tin Interchange
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 新田公路及粉嶺公路，來回方向，近新田交匯處
description.LOCATION_EN: San Tin Highway and Fanling Highway

2024-08-27T14:41:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate the works of Development of Lok Ma Chau Loop, from 11.00 p. m. on 27 August 2024 (Tuesday) to 5.30 a. m. of the following day, the San Tin Highway and Fanling Highway (both bounds) near San Tin Interchange will be fully closed to all vehicular traffic. Affected vehicles are advised to travel via Castle Peak Road or San Tin Interchange.
2024-08-27T14:41:00.CONTENT_CN: 因配合落馬洲河套地區發展工程，新田公路及粉嶺公路(來回方向)將於2024年8月27日(星期二)晚上11時至翌日上午5時30分全線封閉。駕駛人士須改經青山公路或新田交匯處。

2024-08-28T06:02:00.CONTENT_EN: The San Tin Highway and Fanling Highway (both bounds) near San Tin Interchange which was closed due to the works of Development of Lok Ma Chau Loop is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-08-28T06:02:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前配合落馬洲河套地區發展工程⽽封閉的新田公路及粉嶺公路(來回方向)近新田交匯處現已解封。
